mapper.select:
SELECT cc.id, cc.category_code, cc.category_name, cc.category_type, cc.default_max_score, cc.description, cc.icon, cc.sort_order, cc.status, cc.created_at, cc.updated_at, COUNT(ci.id) as item_count FROM check_categories cc LEFT JOIN check_items ci ON cc.id = ci.category_id AND ci.deleted = 0 AND ci.status = 1
cc.deleted = 0
AND cc.category_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.categoryName}, '%')
AND cc.category_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.categoryCode}, '%')
AND cc.category_type = #{query.categoryType}
AND cc.status = #{query.status}
GROUP BY cc.id ORDER BY cc.sort_order ASC, cc.created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM check_categories WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 1 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM check_categories WHERE deleted = 0 AND category_code = #{categoryCode} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM check_categories WHERE deleted = 0 AND category_type = #{categoryType} AND status = 1 ORDER BY sort_order ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM check_items WHERE deleted = 0 AND category_id = #{categoryId}
